value_metric: the first real A0 2016+ history backfill Wave is executed: 7 real gov.cn policy originals across 6 distinct months (2019-2022) run through the T024 identity + T026 version + T021/T022 raw-key pipeline, idempotent (re-running adds no duplicates), attachments and versions preserved, month coverage recorded -- and it runs from the dev environment so the production worker/cron and realtime are untouched (no regression)
